caption:
Most owners never write a follow-up sequence.

They call leads back when there's time. That's why leads go cold.

Black Arrow built a free AI tool that writes the sequence for you.

Give it your service, your average job value, and your current response time. It returns a full cadence: the first text, the email that follows an hour later, and the timing for the second and third touches.

Speed decides most of this business. Leads that don't hear back within the first hour cool fast. By the next day, most have booked with someone else. A written sequence keeps your response instant, even when you're on a job.

The tool is free. No signup, no card. Just your numbers.

#ServiceBusiness #LeadFollowUp #SpeedToLead #SmallBusinessGrowth #HomeServiceMarketing
rationale: Carousels and tool-based lead magnets both index high for saves/DMs right now, and this solo-features the one published free tool (AI Follow-Up Builder) this account hasn't covered yet, tying it directly to the core speed-to-lead principle without relying on unverified statistics.
